calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Eric Davidson, Esq., for Lamarr Ridge, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel acknowledges his client's preliminary distribution without the court's approval and confirms that he advised his client of the issue in doing so.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Continued To Jan-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric E. Davidson for Jeffrey LaMarr Ridge, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. Davidson informed the court that the real property in the estate has been sold, but the final distribution has been delayed due to lack of communication from the administrator, who resides in Portland, Oregon. Counsel made note of outstanding issues, including the payment to the probate referee, and requested a 60-day continuance to resolve these matters.

The court granted the continuance and scheduled the next hearing for January 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court ordered the administrator to appear at the hearing and reminded counsel that the administrator may appear via Zoom. The court further advised that if the petition for final distribution is filed beforehand, the hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
